reviews.comment:
La mejor onda, me pasaron la clave del WiFi par poder pagar con la app de YPF. A la vuelta hay una parrilita muy piola y se comen bien por el mismo valor que un sanguchitonfrio en la estación de servicio

(Translated by Google)
Great service, they gave me the Wi-Fi password so I could pay with the YPF app. There's a really cool little grill around the corner where you can get a good meal for about the same price as a cold sandwich at the gas station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtejVhZDJnRRAB

reviews.comment:
El 16-01-22 por un problema eléctrico no tenían agua los baños principales y las damas tuvieron que hacer cola por 1 hora para usar los auxiliares de atrás, echo muy lamentable y no acorde al ACA, vergonzoso!!!!

(Translated by Google)
On January 16, 2022, due to an electrical problem, the main restrooms had no water, and the ladies had to queue for an hour to use the auxiliary restrooms in the back. This was a very regrettable situation and not in accordance with the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina). Shameful!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtejdLUVBREAE
